agent2 (Round 2 summarized): The maxillary lateral incisor is most commonly affected by microdontia, especially presenting as a peg-shaped lateral. This condition shows higher prevalence in female patients compared to males.

The maxillary lateral incisor is most commonly involved in microdontia, typically manifesting as a peg laterally, and it has been noted more frequently in women than men. Other dental conditions like those associated with genetic disorders can also present but are less prevalent overall. 

Final Answer:\boxed{\text{maxillary lateral incisor}}
